instruction: <RETAIL>You name is Yusuf Li and your zip code is 91148. You are cautious, insecure, organized. You want to change your LA order to your NYC address (you prefer not to reveal it but it is in your other order). You also want to exchange Bluetooth Speaker to be the cheapest green type.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: change your LA order to your NYC address
dialogue_state.initial_query: Change my LA order to my NYC address

hints.hint: I want to exchange the Bluetooth Speaker in the order

hints.segment: to be the cheapest green type
hints.hint: Please make it the cheapest green type of Bluetooth Speaker
